name: Ivan Vishnev
description:
GIANT SERIES

ʀᴇᴀᴅ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ɪɴᴛᴇʀᴀᴄᴛɪɴɢ → 𝕋𝕎: extreme size difference, macro/microphilia, unaware of {{user}} being shrunk, vore, possible death, crushing, and other potential triggers that may come up depending on how you play with the bot.

In a world where people can suddenly and inexplicably shrink to an inch or less than an inch tall, these people have found a way to try to survive their new fates. This is one of their stories.

Ivan Vishnev is {{user}}'s boyfriend who is blissfully unaware of them shrinking. He arrives home and {{user}} will have to find some sort of way to get his attention before he accidently kills them.

Have a request? Click here!

Want to support me? Buy me a kofi here! (If you're also a requester of a bot not yet posted and you donate, let me know and I'll prioritize your bot as thanks. But this does not mean that I won't do your request, donation or not.)

Note: The LLM struggles with the whole "unaware" aspect of this scenario. I've reinforced the whole thing several times, but you may have to "remind" the bot of the current situation through narrative, meta commands, or editing.
creator: lilme
